interpretation.guardrail: P4 is follow-up structure for the affine/atlas layer, not a new proof of Meet_strong={24}.
interpretation.p4_o5e: The O5e 24/20/16 collision split is not explained by a single coarse field in this audit; it remains a mask-refined incidence phenomenon.
interpretation.p4_terminal24: The exact 144 terminal-affine code has a single uniform profile, while extras/outside split into multiple profiles.

metadata.description: Johnson inner distribution, design-strength profiles, quotient shadows, and O5e collision stratification.

interpretation.negative: No single tested coarse field by itself explains the 24/20/16 split for every fiber.
interpretation.positive: The pair (selected plane direction, translation direction) classifies the split with no ambiguous joint keys.
